summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DPM Beauty Pageant 2026 landing page new features: popup form (5-second delay, sessionStorage, form validation) and enhanced button animations (pulse glow, hover effects, ripple clicks, outline fill). All features working perfectly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with all 14 sections
Popup form appears after 5 seconds with correct data-testids
Popup form validation and submission works correctly
Popup success state displays and auto-closes with scroll to #apply
SessionStorage prevents popup re-showing on reload
Popup close button works with rotate animation
Gold buttons have pulse glow animation (btnPulseGlow, 2.5s)
Hero and Final CTA buttons have pulse animation class
Gold button hover animations (translateY + scale) working
Outline button slide-in fill animation working
Ripple effect setup present on gold button clicks
Sticky navigation and footer bar positioned correctly
No error messages found on page
Found 13 gold buttons and 1 outline button as expected
